plugins.name: ai-workflow
plugins.description: The AI-agent software workflow: 39 skills covering the full lifecycle - idea validation, research, intent elicitation, prototyping, spec-to-issues, session bookends, durability checkpoints, test-first building, review, diagnosis, design, self-audits, and skill lifecycle management. Atomic sub-skills invocable via subagents, vendor-agnostic model/effort routing (Claude + OpenAI/Codex), and a per-skill eval harness.
